author: barnabasbusa
content: So there has been a long running peering bug between prysm and grandine on most of our devnets and just spent some time investigating because I was curious to see what the root cause is. It seems like the main issue was that we never had prysm's QUIC port open for inbound connections, and grandine never falls back to try TCP, so they would just stay disconnected. Now that I have enabled the port its working fine.

author: barnabasbusa
content: we now have a full mesh

author: potuz
content: Why didn't Prysm try to connect by QUIC to grandine?
